subcodes.first_line: O thou wondrous creation of matchless attributes! Truly thou art deserving of tenderness and worthy of the grace and favors of the One True God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای صنیع بدیع الاوصاف حقا که سزاوار ملاطفتی و مستحق عنایت و الطاف حضرت احدیت
subcodes.subjects: @high station of the true believer, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @praise and encouragement, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
